title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate Post
org: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
shortInfo: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) JRF / Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 02 April 2026 on the official website of JIPMER. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate Post
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate I
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) JRF / Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 02 April 2026 on the official website of JIPMER. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Relaxation applicable for women / OBC / SC / ST / PH candidates as per norms

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science, Graduate
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course AND selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET (including lectureship) or GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments / Agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, NISER, etc.)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate - I

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30000/- + HRA - Rs. 43,660/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month plus 18% HRA (Rs. 5,040/-)= Rs. 43,660/- per month( JRF)/ Rs. 30,000/-+HRA (18%=5,400/) =Rs 35,400/- per month.(Project Associate 1)

selection_process: CV & documents Written Test (Analytical & logical reasoning
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course and be NET/GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- + HRA to Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month, depending on the specific role and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JIPMER Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on applications, followed by a written test and an interview. The written test will cover analytical reasoning, image processing, and AI/ML concepts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at JIPMER.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER).

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement date was 30th April 2026, the last date to apply is 30th May 2026, and the interview will be held on 11th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. How should I send my application?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email to the official email address provided in the notification. Ensure all required documents are attached.
